title: Cyberpunk RED - Evasion Workflow
description: Interactive Evasion/Dodge workflow for Cyberpunk RED. On a ranged attack the target's controlling user is prompted to Evade (Ausweichen) or Tank (Tanken) BEFORE hit/miss is revealed (blind decision), and Diwako's spoiler hit/miss line is optionally suppressed. Melee and thrown-in-melee attacks auto-resolve the opposed Evasion roll with no prompt. On a confirmed hit the module can optionally auto-roll AND apply the weapon damage via the system's own damage pipeline (GM-routed; grenades/rockets/thrown and autofire/aimed shots fall back to the manual Roll Damage button). Coexists with diwako-cpred-additions without modifying it.
